messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0011",
  "title": "2023年",
  "page_index": 5,
  "page_range": "5"
}

Section text:
### 2023年
- **1-10名收入规模占比**：43.14%
- **11-50名收入规模占比**：26.62%
- **51-200名收入规模占比**：19.45%
- **其他移动游戏收入规模占比**：10.79%

message.content: This section answers questions regarding the 2023 mobile game market revenue distribution by ranking tier. It provides quantitative metrics (revenue scale proportions) for four entity categories: top 1–10 ranked games (43.14%), 11–50 ranked games (26.62%), 51–200 ranked games (19.45%), and other mobile games (10.79%). The content serves as statistical evidence for market concentration analysis in 2023. It does not contain definitions, procedures, qualitative claims, tables, or figures.
